non_derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: On April 21, 2021, the reporting person was granted time vesting restricted stock units (TVRSUs). Each TVRSU represents a contingent right to receive one share of common stock. The TVRSUs vest in three equal annual installments beginning April 21, 2022.

derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: On April 21, 2021, the reporting person was granted performance vesting restricted stock units (PVRSUs). Seventy-five percent (75%) of the PVRSUs may vest over a three year period based on the attainment of absolute total stockholder return metrics by the Company. The remaining twenty-five percent (25%) of the PVRSUs may vest based on the Company's TSR relative to peer REITs.

footnotes.1: On April 21, 2021, the reporting person was granted time vesting restricted stock units (each, a "TVRSU"). Each TVRSU represents a contingent right to receive one share of common stock, $0.01 par value (the "Common Stock"), of Mack-Cali Realty Corporation (the "Company").
footnotes.2: The TVRSUs vest in three equal annual installments beginning April 21, 2022.
footnotes.3: On April 21, 2021, the reporting person was granted performance vesting restricted stock units (each, a "PVRSU").  Each PVRSU represents represents a contingent right to receive one share of Common Stock.
footnotes.4: Seventy-five percent (75%) of the PVRSUs may vest over a three year period based on the attainment of absolute total stockholder return ("TSR") metrics by the Company over a three year performance period. The remaining twenty-five percent (25%) of the PVRSUs may vest over a three year period based on the Company's TSR relative to the TSR of a select group of twenty-four (24) peer REITs over the same three year performance period.
